items.description: Role metadata generated from metadata.rb
items.notes: Converted metadata.rb: namespace x2a, Ubuntu focal/jammy, EL 7/8/9, Apache-2.0

items.description: Role variables (site definitions, SSL paths, etc.)
items.notes: Internal role variables: nginx config paths, fail2ban path, sysctl path, sshd_config path

items.description: Handlers for nginx reload, fail2ban restart, ssh restart
items.notes: Handlers: reload/restart nginx, restart fail2ban, restart ssh (OS-aware), reload sysctl

items.description: Default variables for the role (merged from attributes)
items.notes: Already written as part of meta/main.yml - duplicate entry

items.description: Chef attributes converted to Ansible defaults (nginx settings, security flags, site definitions, SSL params)
items.notes: Converted Chef attributes to Ansible defaults: nginx_sites dict, SSL paths, cert generation params, security flags, OS-dependent nginx_user

items.description: SSL certificate generation: openssl/ca-certificates install, ssl-cert group, cert/key directories, self-signed cert generation for all 3 sites
items.notes: Converted: openssl package, ssl-cert group, cert/key dirs, self-signed cert generation with creates idempotency, key permissions

items.description: Security hardening tasks: fail2ban, UFW firewall rules, sysctl kernel params, SSH hardening (disable root login, disable password auth)
items.notes: Converted: fail2ban/ufw install, UFW rules via ansible.builtin.command, sysctl hardening, SSH lineinfile hardening

items.description: Entry point recipe — includes security, nginx, ssl, sites sub-tasks in order
items.notes: Converted include_recipe chain to include_tasks; validate_credentials.yml first; R301 warning is false positive on include_tasks filenames

items.description: nginx install, global config, security snippet, service management, document root directories and static content deployment
items.notes: Converted: nginx install, nginx.conf + security.conf templates, service enable/start, document root dirs, index.html copy per site

items.description: Virtual host config deployment, sites-enabled symlinks, default site removal for all 3 sites (test, ci, status)
items.notes: Converted: site.conf.j2 template per site with vars:, symlinks in sites-enabled, removal of default site

items.description: Per-site nginx virtual host config: HTTP→HTTPS redirect block, HTTPS block with SSL, HSTS, security headers, gzip, per-site logs. Rendered 3 times (test, ci, status)
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2 with SSL conditional blocks, security headers, and gzip config

items.description: Global nginx configuration: worker settings, logging, gzip, includes for conf.d and sites-enabled
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2 - main nginx configuration

items.description: Kernel sysctl hardening parameters: rp_filter, redirect/source-route blocking, log_martians, ICMP ignore, IPv6 disable, TCP SYN cookie protection
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2 - kernel security hardening parameters

items.description: fail2ban jail configuration: DEFAULT bantime/findtime/maxretry, sshd jail, nginx-http-auth, nginx-limit-req, nginx-botsearch jails
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2 - fail2ban jail configuration with SSH and nginx jails

items.description: nginx security snippet: server_tokens off, rate limiting zones, buffer sizes, timeouts, global SSL settings (TLSv1.2+TLSv1.3, cipher suite)
items.notes: Converted ERB to Jinja2 - nginx security configuration (rate limiting, buffer overflow protection, SSL settings)

items.description: Verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for nginx configs, SSL cert/key files, document roots, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl config, sshd_config hardening
items.notes: 12 sections: dirs, nginx.conf, security.conf, 3x site configs (content+mode), sites-enabled symlinks+target, default site absent, SSL certs+keys (mode 0640), index.html per site, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl params, sshd_config (PermitRootLogin+PasswordAuthentication), log files. Service/port checks tagged molecule-notest.

items.description: Converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (nginx configs, SSL dirs, document roots, fail2ban/sysctl configs)
items.notes: Builds full /tmp/molecule_test/ filesystem: dirs, nginx.conf, security.conf, 3x site configs, sites-enabled symlinks, SSL cert/key placeholders (mode 0640 on keys), document roots with index.html, fail2ban jail.local, sysctl 99-security.conf, sshd_config, nginx log placeholders. No become, no include_role.
